pilots.description: 5-epoch smoke test of PMP-WD optimizer + diagnostics instrumentation on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20
pilots.pass_criteria: PMP-WD runs without error; diagnostics.jsonl written with fields: delta_t, w_norm, g_norm, r_t, V_t, lambda_min, lambda_max, effective_wd
pilots.fallback_on_fail: Check momentum buffer access, gradient computation order, L estimation stability

pilots.description: Full 200-epoch PMP-WD run on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 to validate Theorem 4 predictions
pilots.pass_criteria: Test accuracy >= 88% (within 2% of constant 90.13%); no divergence; lambda(t) trajectory shows clear bang-bang switching; V_T(PMP-WD) is finite and comparable to V_T(constant)
pilots.fallback_on_fail: If divergence: reduce Lambda_max from 5e-4 to 1e-4. If no bang-bang: check costate proxy computation. If accuracy < 86%: try soft sigmoid approximation.
key_diagnostics: lambda(t) trajectory: should show binary switching
Fraction of parameters with lambda > 0 per epoch (switching frequency)
Correlation between <p(t), w(t)> and sign(cos(g,w)) -- tests CWD connection
V_T comparison against constant WD baseline

pilots.description: Pilot cosine_schedule and PMP-WD on ResNet-20-NoBN, 200 epochs, seed 42
pilots.pass_criteria: Both methods converge; accuracy > 85% (NoBN typically ~2-3% lower than BN); no gradient explosion
pilots.fallback_on_fail: If divergence: reduce LR to 0.05 for NoBN (known to need lower LR). If accuracy very low (<80%): check model definition.

pilots.description: 2-epoch ImageNet/ResNet-50 training with DDP on 2 GPUs. Diagnose why previous attempts failed.
pilots.pass_criteria: Training completes 2 epochs without error; data loading throughput > 500 img/s; no OOM on 2x RTX PRO 6000 (98GB); top-1 > 5% (sanity)
pilots.fallback_on_fail: Check: (1) ImageNet data path exists and is readable, (2) DDP init (NCCL), (3) batch size fits in memory, (4) num_workers for DataLoader. Previous failures may be data path or DDP config issues.
diagnosis_steps: Verify ImageNet data exists at expected path
Test single-GPU training first, then DDP
Monitor GPU memory usage during first batch

pilots.description: Test full-batch alignment computation on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 with constant WD, 20 epochs
pilots.pass_criteria: Full-batch delta_t computed every 10 epochs; values in [-1, 1]; computation adds < 50% overhead to training time; at least one |rho| > 0.3 on this single config
pilots.fallback_on_fail: If too slow: subsample to 10% of training set for alignment computation. If delta_t always near 0: check gradient computation (should use full training set, not minibatch).

gate_policy: Each pilot must pass before its dependent full tasks are launched. Pilots 1-2 are sequential (PMP-WD implementation then validation). Pilots 3-5 can run in parallel after pilot 1 passes.
